hero.label: Made for Hellometer
hero.headline: I want to be your first sales hire and help fast food operators stop losing revenue.
hero.subheadline: Hellometer is solving a real operations problem that operators haven't had good data on. The combination of computer vision, real-time speed metrics, and revenue impact is exactly the kind of mission-critical product I'd love to sell. I want to help build the playbook from scratch.

whyCompany.title: Real-time speed data is a genuine gap in restaurant ops
whyCompany.body: Operators have always known speed matters but never had precise, location-level data to act on it. Hellometer turns a gut feeling into a revenue number. That's a powerful story to tell to any franchise owner or multi-unit operator.

whyCompany.title: The 'All-In' mention signals breakout momentum
whyCompany.body: When the top business podcast in the world notices you, the market is paying attention. This is exactly the right moment to build the sales engine before the wave hits. Early sales hires at inflection points like this have an outsized impact.

whyCompany.title: My BDR background maps directly to this role
whyCompany.body: At Copygen.ai I cold-called and emailed from zero pipeline to 15-20 paying clients. I'm comfortable with rejection and fast iteration. Selling to restaurant operators and franchise groups is the kind of scrappy, relationship-driven outbound I've been trained for.

quote: I built an OpenClaw AI agent that automates outbound BDR work on the side. I want to bring that same operator mindset to Hellometer and help you figure out what scales.
